name: io.github.freema/mcp-gsheets
description: MCP server for Google Sheets API — read, write, format, batch operations.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Path to service account key JSON file (auth method 1)

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Service account key as JSON string (auth method 2)

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Service account private key in PEM format (auth method 3)
